mapper.select: SELECT WLF_UNIQ_NO, WLF_FLNM_CNTT, WLF_FIRST_NAME_CNTT, WLF_MIDDLE_NAME_CNTT, WLF_LAST_NAME_CNTT, WLF_NTNT_CNTT, SPLM_DATE, SANCTION_TP, LIST_DT, USE_CCD, REG_DT FROM NIC19B_FACTIVA_UA WHERE WLF_UNIQ_NO = #{wlId}

SELECT WLF_UNIQ_NO, WLF_FLNM_CNTT, WLF_FIRST_NAME_CNTT, WLF_MIDDLE_NAME_CNTT, WLF_LAST_NAME_CNTT, WLF_NTNT_CNTT, SPLM_DATE, SANCTION_TP, LIST_DT, USE_CCD, REG_DT FROM NIC19B_FACTIVA_UA WHERE USE_CCD = 'Y' ORDER BY WLF_UNIQ_NO
mapper.update: UPDATE NIC19B_FACTIVA_UA SET WLF_FLNM_CNTT = #{wlNm}, WLF_NTNT_CNTT = #{wlSrcCd}, SANCTION_TP = #{sanctionTp}, LIST_DT = #{listDt}, USE_CCD = #{useYn} WHERE WLF_UNIQ_NO = #{wlId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WL_SCREEN_RSLT (RNMCNO, WLF_UNIQ_NO, MATCH_SCR, MATCH_ST_CCD, SCREEN_DT, REG_ID, REG_DT) VALUES (#{custNo}, #{wlId}, #{matchScr}, #{matchStCd}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{regId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE WL_SCREEN_RSLT SET MATCH_ST_CCD = #{matchStCd}, REVIEW_ID = #{reviewId}, REVIEW_DT = #{reviewDt}, REMARK = #{remark}, UPD_ID = #{updId}, UPD_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE SCREEN_ID = #{screenId}
mapper.select: SELECT SCREEN_ID, RNMCNO, WLF_UNIQ_NO, MATCH_SCR, MATCH_ST_CCD, SCREEN_DT, REVIEW_ID, REVIEW_DT, REMARK, REG_ID, REG_DT, UPD_ID, UPD_DT FROM WL_SCREEN_RSLT WHERE SCREEN_ID = #{screenId}
